artPrompt: A towering giant performer flexes beneath a sideshow tent, oiled muscles catching hot-gold firelight, gripping a massive striped mallet beside a bolted-down high-striker bell that will never ring. Lurid neon and drifting embers haze the smoky black carnival behind him. Heroic low film-still angle of brute carnival spectacle at epic scale, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Strongman of the Sideshow
text:
Trample
Whenever you roll one or more dice, Strongman of the Sideshow gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavorText: Ring the bell, win a prize. The bell is bolted down.
